title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners
company: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners!
